name: MacroTrack India 40+ — Nutrition Tracker
description: Daily macro nutrition tracker with WHO/ICMR standards, BMI assessment, and Indian food database for adults 40+

screenshots.src: data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 540 720'><rect fill='%23f5f3ed' width='540' height='720'/><rect fill='%231D9E75' width='540' height='60'/><text x='270' y='40' font-size='24' font-weight='700' fill='white' text-anchor='middle' dominant-baseline='central'>MacroTrack</text><text x='30' y='150' font-size='18' font-weight='600' fill='%231D9E75'>Profile · BMI · Targets</text><text x='30' y='200' font-size='14' fill='%23888' font-family='monospace'>Set age, weight, activities → auto-calc TDEE</text><text x='30' y='280' font-size='18' font-weight='600' fill='%231D9E75'>Food Log</text><text x='30' y='330' font-size='14' fill='%23888'>1,000+ Indian foods · editable portions</text><text x='30' y='410' font-size='18' font-weight='600' fill='%231D9E75'>Today's Macros</text><text x='30' y='460' font-size='14' fill='%23888'>Live pie chart · protein/carbs/fat targets</text></svg>
